sha_binding.note: Pre-merge: SHA binding completed by post-merge-lane-close.yml once the runtime proof is trustworthy and the lane merges. Held per PM directive 2026-06-22 during active Supabase degradation.

unit_test.note: Deterministic; injected no-op sleep; no live DB. Exercises the crash-loop failure mode directly.

required_before_merge: pnpm test:db PASS against live Supabase in a stable (non-degraded) window
pnpm verify PASS end-to-end on the branch
this evidence bundle re-emitted with sha_binding bound to the merge SHA
post-deploy observation: ingestor restart count stabilizes
runtime_proof.note: No test:db output fabricated. Runtime proof intentionally deferred per PM directive while Supabase is degraded.
